headline: The Iran War Isn’t Stopping TJX From Raising Its Dividend
summary: TJX Cos. stock is trading about 5% below record highs and management on Monday officially raised its quarterly dividend by 13%.

raw.headline: The Iran War Isn’t Stopping TJX From Raising Its Dividend
raw.summary: TJX Cos. stock is trading about 5% below record highs and management on Monday officially raised its quarterly dividend by 13%.

headline: The TJX Companies, Inc. Announces 13% Increase in Common Stock Dividend
summary: FRAMINGHAM, Mass., March 30, 2026--The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TJX) today announced that its Board of Directors has raised the amount of its quarterly dividend by 13% from the last dividend paid. The Board declared a regular quarterly dividend in the amount of $.48 per share, payable June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 14, 2026.
